strings.ACHIEVEMENT_MOFFEINHANDOVERCLOCKEDCLEARG: Ut HAN-D, ludum perfice aut te dele in Monsoon.
Ut HAN-D, ludum perfice aut te dele in Typhoon vel Eclipse.\n<color=#8888>(Computat quamlibet difficultatem Typhoon aut superiorem)</color>
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_MOFFEINHANDOVERCLOCKEDNEMESI: OVERCLOCK activum tene plus quam XLV secundis.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_MOFFEINHANDOVERCLOCKEDSURVIV: Robotum custodem in Rallypoint Delta refice utens Fuel Array capsulae Escape Pod.
strings.KEYWORD_MOFFEINHANDOVERCLOCKED_BOOST: <style=cKeywordName>Impetus</style><style=cSub>Ars mature irrita fieri potest ut sursum impellaris.</style>
strings.MOFFEIN_HAND_BODY_DESCRIPTION:
HAN-D est robotus custos robustus cuius validae oppugnationes proximae certam confusionem relinquunt! <style=cSub>

< ! > HURT maiorem repulsionem contra hostes aereos habet. Utere FORCED_REASSEMBLY ut hostes in aerem mittas, deinde HURT ad eos volare facias!

< ! > OVERCLOCK durat quamdiu hostes ferire potes.

< ! > OVERCLOCK irritum facere te sursum impellet et hostes volantes attingere sinet.

< ! > Utere DRONES ut saneris et in proelio maneas.
strings.MOFFEIN_HAND_BODY_LORE: //--TRANSCRIPTIO AUTOMATICA EX DEPARTAMENTO UES [REDACTUM]--// *haurit Spinel Tonic* Num ludere sine artefacto Command est ultima forma cornuti esse? Nihil magis cornutum cogitare aut intellegere possum quam sine Command ludere. Sincere, rem ratione considera. Iaculas, curris atque salis per circiter sexaginta minuta tantum ut damnatum Squid Polyp accipias. Totus ille labor quem in cursum tuum posuisti — lasers Stone Golem vitando, sex milibus Lesser Wisps supra caput tuum apparentibus vexatus, Shrines of the Mountain activando — ad unum tantum exitum ducit: inventarium tuum Warbanners et monilia Monster Tooth impletur, rebus pecunia emptis. In cursu divino? Optime. Multa instrumenta misera et inutilia, quae nihil cursui tuo conferunt, ex Chests quas emis proveniunt. Eae fructum capiunt ex pecunia labore parta, quae ex necandis Lemurians venit. Ut vir qui hoc ludum ludit, LITTERALITER duas horas vitae tuae capsas aperiendo et precando consumis, ne alia Chronobauble sit. Haec est absoluta et ultima conditio cornuti. De hoc logice cogita. Transcriptio perfecta.
strings.MOFFEIN_HAND_BODY_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..ita evanuit, nullum praemium pro omnibus laboribus accipiens.
strings.MOFFEIN_HAND_BODY_PASSIVE_DESC: <style=cIsDamage>Damnum acceptum minue</style> per <style=cIsDamage>0.3%</style> salutis maximae tuae pro quolibet <style=cIsUtility>drone</style> possesso.
strings.MOFFEIN_HAND_BODY_PRIMARY_DESC: Vim omnibus pugnantibus infer pro <style=cIsDamage>390% damno</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Obstupescere facit</style> dum <style=cIsDamage>OVERCLOCK</style> activum est.
strings.MOFFEIN_HAND_BODY_PRIMARY_HAMMER_DESC: <style=cIsHealth>Lentus fies</style> et omnes pugnantis contere pro <style=cIsDamage>600% damno</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Obstupescere facit</style> dum <style=cIsDamage>OVERCLOCK</style> activum est.
strings.MOFFEIN_HAND_BODY_SECONDARY_DESC: <style=cIsDamage>Obstupefaciens</style>. Accumula vim et magnam potentiam omnibus pugnantibus infer pro <style=cIsDamage>600%-1500% damno</style>.
strings.MOFFEIN_HAND_BODY_SECONDARY_SCEPTER_DESC: <style=cIsDamage>Obstupefaciens</style>. Accumula et <style=cIsHealth>OPPRESSIVAM</style> vim infer pro <style=cIsDamage>900%-2250% damno</style>.
strings.MOFFEIN_HAND_BODY_SPECIAL_DESC: Emitte drone quae <style=cIsDamage>270% damni</style> infert et <style=cIsHealing>40% damni sanando reddit</style>. Neces et ictus propinqui <style=cIsUtility>refrigerium minuunt</style>.
strings.MOFFEIN_HAND_BODY_SPECIAL_SPEED_DESC: Emitte drone quae <style=cIsDamage>270% damni</style> infert et <style=cIsDamage>celeritatem impetus ad tempus dat</style>. Neces et ictus propinqui <style=cIsUtility>refrigerium minuunt</style>.
strings.MOFFEIN_HAND_BODY_UTILITY_DESC: <style=cIsUtility>Impetus</style>. Auge <style=cIsUtility>celeritatem motus</style> et <style=cIsDamage>celeritatem impetus</style> per <style=cIsDamage>40%</style>. Hostes feri ut <style=cIsUtility>durationem augeas</style>.
strings.MOFFEIN_HAND_BODY_UTILITY_NEMESIS_DESC: <style=cIsUtility>Impetus</style>. Accipe <style=cIsDamage>+50% damni</style> et <style=cIsUtility>50 armaturae</style>. Hostes feri ut <style=cIsUtility>durationem augeas</style>.
